message:
feat: Add Ollama-compatible native API endpoints

Add /api/* endpoints to align with Ollama's native API:
- /api/version - version info
- /api/tags - list models
- /api/show - model details
- /api/ps - running models
- /api/generate - text completion (streaming/batch)
- /api/chat - chat completion (streaming/batch)

All timestamps use ISO8601 format (e.g. "2023-08-04T19:22:45.000000Z")
to match Ollama's response format. Supports both streaming
(newline-delimited JSON with chunked transfer) and non-streaming modes.

Zell now supports three API formats:
- Ollama native (/api/*)
- OpenAI (/v1/chat/completions, /v1/models)
- Anthropic (/v1/messages)
